strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no shipped AI products, research, or recognized AI expertise
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no clear principal/director-level IC track record
Cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK usage rather than strategic cloud platform leadership

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
Principal/Director-level IC and strategic advisory experience
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial ownership

response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 15 years of versatile full-stack and systems engineering experience plus founder-level initiative through GISCollective, and has begun touching AI-agent tooling at re:cinq. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and strategic cloud/AI advisory impact — areas where the resume shows only nascent involvement and no advanced AI credentials or platform-scale AI leadership, making fit limited for a Principal AI Strategy role.
